param.name: gpu
param.label: GPU Device IDs
param.help: Specify which GPU(s) should be used. Multiple GPUs are separated by a space. E.g., '0' or '0 1'. Enter '-1' to use CPU only.

param.name: gpu_fraction
param.label: GPU Memory Fraction
param.help: Specify the fraction of memory per GPU used by crYOLO. Only values between 0.0 and 1.0 are allowed.
